description: Generated Slack Web API read-only OpenAPI MCP catalog manifest.

notes: Official Slack platform spec repository: https://github.com/slackapi/slack-api-specs (now archived/read-only)
Pinned source path: web-api/slack_web_openapi_v2.json (Slack Web API, Swagger/OpenAPI 2.0, spec version 1.7.0)
Pinned commit date: 2020-10-06 (October 2020 spec updates), the last commit touching this file
The committed manifest selects read-only Slack auth, team, users, and conversations list operations only.

network: GET https://slack.com/api/auth.test for selected upstream operation
GET https://slack.com/api/team.info for selected upstream operation
GET https://slack.com/api/users.list for selected upstream operation
GET https://slack.com/api/conversations.list for selected upstream operation
process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
